entries.issue: I forgot my password and cannot sign in.
entries.instruction: Use the Reset Password link on the sign-in page, then confirm from your email and create a new password.

entries.issue: My two-factor code is not accepted.
entries.instruction: Check device time sync, request a fresh code, and retry once; if still failing, use backup codes or contact admin reset.

entries.issue: I do not receive verification email.
entries.instruction: Check spam/junk, verify mailbox quota, allow sender domain, then request a new verification message.
Restart the app, clear cache, check network stability, and disable heavy background tabs or downloads.
Confirm file type and size limits, rename file without special characters, and retry on a stable connection.
Verify output device, unmute system and app volume, refresh the page, and test with another browser profile.
Allow microphone permissions, select the correct input device, and reconnect or restart audio drivers.
Close other apps using camera, grant camera permission, and reconnect webcam or restart browser.
Switch networks if possible, disable VPN/proxy temporarily, and retry after checking service status page.
Enable cookies for the site, avoid private mode for long sessions, and refresh token by signing in again.
Check required fields, remove invalid characters, and confirm your account has permissions to edit settings.
Request access from project owner, verify correct account is active, and re-open the invite link.

entries.issue: Search returns no results even for known items.
entries.instruction: Clear filters, check date range, and reindex or wait for background indexing to complete.
Enable notifications in profile and browser settings, whitelist app domain, and check do-not-disturb rules.
Reboot machine, install latest app version, and remove corrupted local cache before relaunching.
Run installer as administrator, ensure enough disk space, and disable antivirus briefly during update.
Keep the latest trusted record, resolve field conflicts manually, then trigger a full sync.
Reduce report size, shorten date range, and retry export with CSV before PDF if limits are strict.
Hard refresh browser, disable extensions for the site, and test in incognito or another browser.

entries.issue: How do I contact human support?
entries.instruction: Open Help > Contact Support, include error screenshot and timestamp, and provide your account email.
